vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp nguyên sơ (chưa bị con người tác động)
vocab.example: I am particularly drawn to capturing the unspoilt beauty of remote coastal areas before they become commercialized.

vocab.meaning: con mắt tinh tường đối với các chi tiết
vocab.example: To be a good landscape photographer, you really need a keen eye for detail to spot the subtle patterns in nature.
I don't just snap photos; I carefully consider the visual aesthetics, ensuring the colors and light are perfectly balanced.

vocab.meaning: hình ảnh gợi cảm xúc mạnh
vocab.example: My goal is to create evocative imagery that makes the viewer feel as though they are standing right there in the forest.

vocab.meaning: những sắc thái màu sắc rực rỡ
vocab.example: The vibrant hues of the sunset reflected on the lake were so stunning that I had to stop and take a dozen pictures.

vocab.meaning: sự đan xen/vũ điệu của ánh sáng và bóng tối
vocab.example: I love how the play of light and shadow on the rolling hills adds a sense of drama and depth to a photograph.
As an amateur enthusiast, I spend most of my weekends exploring national parks with my trusty DSLR camera.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn toàn cảnh bao la rộng lớn
vocab.example: From the observation deck, you can get panoramic sweeping views of the entire valley, which are perfect for photography.

vocab.meaning: gu thẩm mỹ/năng khiếu nghệ thuật
vocab.example: Taking scenery pictures allows me to express my artistic flair by experimenting with different angles and filters.

vocab.meaning: những khoảnh khắc phù du (ngắn ngủi, chóng qua)
vocab.example: Photography is my way of freezing ephemeral moments, like a rainbow appearing for just a few seconds over a waterfall.
